query: What is the current state of open-source LLM agent frameworks?
answer: Open-source LLM agent frameworks have consolidated further around graph-based orchestration, with LangGraph now the default recommendation in most tutorials and starter templates. AutoGen remains popular for multi-agent conversation patterns. A widely-shared postmortem from an enterprise adopter detailed a production incident caused by an agent looping on a failed tool call for several hours before a human noticed, reigniting debate over whether current frameworks provide adequate guardrails for autonomous execution versus requiring a human-in-the-loop checkpoint by default. The long-horizon tool-use leaderboard has been updated with two additional frameworks, and reliability past 15 sequential tool calls remains the industry-wide weak point.

citations.title: Postmortem: Agent Tool-Call Loop Incident
